curation_notes: Patch commit c9ef5bd changes 4 source files in src/vtab/: mod.rs, array.rs, csvtab.rs, and series.rs. The core fix is in mod.rs where the VTab and VTabCursor trait definitions are changed from safe to unsafe traits. The other 3 files mechanically add the unsafe keyword to their impl blocks. Locations derived from the patch diff — the trait definitions in mod.rs are the root cause since they failed to enforce memory layout invariants required for safe FFI interaction with SQLite's C code.
